free_text: Alpha particle induced reactions on 153Eu as possible
electrochemically deposited on a titanium foil
(2 mu-m). The thickness of layers was 200-240 mu-g/cm2
with the spot diameter of 20 mm.
ORTEC GEM 35P4 high purity germanium detector
with energy resolution of 850 eV for the 122 keV line
and 1.8 keV for the 1330 keV line was used.
(4.95 +- 0.10 mu-m) foils as monitors and aluminum
Time of irradiation was 1 hour. Two
Beam current uncertainty was 4% and 12% for the two
The measured excitation functions were compared
with the data from TENDL-2023 library.
Entry was approved by Dr. E.S.Kormazeva.
